errors.description: The agent used the python_interpreter tool to invoke the search_agent task instead of directly using the appropriate team member or search tool, leading to incorrect tool selection and potential execution errors.

errors.evidence: The plan output did not include the required '<end_plan>' tag after the final step as instructed.
